psalm-90-1.verse: Lord, You have been our dwelling place in all generations.
psalm-90-1.prayer: Lord, You have been our dwelling place through every generation. Help me find my home, safety, and rest in You.

psalm-90-2.verse:
Before the mountains were born
  Or You gave birth to the earth and the world,
  Even from everlasting to everlasting, You are God.
psalm-90-2.prayer: Father, before the mountains were formed, You were God. Help me trust Your eternal power and unchanging nature.

psalm-90-3.verse:
You turn man back into dust
  And say, “Return, O children of men.”
psalm-90-3.prayer: Lord, remind me that my life is in Your hands. Teach me humility as I remember that You are the Creator and Sustainer of all.

psalm-90-4.verse:
For a thousand years in Your sight
  Are like yesterday when it passes by,
  Or as a watch in the night.
psalm-90-4.prayer: Father, time is never beyond Your control. Help me trust Your perspective when my own understanding feels limited.

psalm-90-5.verse:
You have swept them away like a flood, they fall asleep;
  In the morning they are like grass which sprouts anew.
psalm-90-5.prayer: Lord, teach me that life is brief and fragile. Help me live each day with wisdom, gratitude, and purpose.

psalm-90-6.verse:
In the morning it flourishes and sprouts anew;
  Toward evening it fades and withers away.
psalm-90-6.prayer: Father, remind me that earthly life fades quickly, but Your truth and kingdom endure forever.

psalm-90-7.verse:
For we have been consumed by Your anger
  And by Your wrath we have been dismayed.
psalm-90-7.prayer: Lord, help me take Your holiness seriously. Lead me away from sin and into reverence, repentance, and obedience.

psalm-90-8.verse:
You have placed our iniquities before You,
  Our secret sins in the light of Your presence.
psalm-90-8.prayer: Father, You see every hidden thing. Purify my heart and help me live honestly before You.

psalm-90-9.verse:
For all our days have declined in Your fury;
  We have finished our years like a sigh.
psalm-90-9.prayer: Lord, when my days feel difficult or heavy, help me turn to You for strength, mercy, and hope.

psalm-90-10.verse:
As for the days of our life, they contain seventy years,
  Or if due to strength, eighty years,
  Yet their pride is but labor and sorrow;
  For soon it is gone and we fly away.
psalm-90-10.prayer: Father, teach me to value my time wisely and live with an eternal perspective.

psalm-90-11.verse:
Who understands the power of Your anger
  And Your fury, according to the fear that is due You?
psalm-90-11.prayer: Lord, give me a proper reverence for Your power, holiness, and righteous judgment.

psalm-90-12.verse:
So teach us to number our days,
  That we may present to You a heart of wisdom.
psalm-90-12.prayer: Father, teach me to number my days so that I may gain a heart of wisdom.

psalm-90-13.verse:
Do return, O Lord; how long will it be?
  And be sorry for Your servants.
psalm-90-13.prayer: Lord, turn toward me with compassion. Let Your mercy restore my heart and renew my hope.

psalm-90-14.verse:
O satisfy us in the morning with Your lovingkindness,
  That we may sing for joy and be glad all our days.
psalm-90-14.prayer: Father, satisfy me in the morning with Your lovingkindness, so I may sing for joy and be glad all my days.

psalm-90-15.verse:
Make us glad according to the days You have afflicted us,
  And the years we have seen evil.
psalm-90-15.prayer: Lord, bring joy and restoration after seasons of difficulty, sorrow, or hardship.

psalm-90-16.verse:
Let Your work appear to Your servants
  And Your majesty to their children.
psalm-90-16.prayer: Father, let Your work be shown in my life and Your majesty be seen by future generations.

psalm-90-17.prayer: Lord, let Your favor rest upon me. Establish the work of my hands and let my life honor You.

psalm-90-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for being eternal, faithful, and present through every generation. Teach me to number my days with wisdom, live with humility, and seek Your mercy each morning. Satisfy my heart with Your lovingkindness, restore joy after hardship, and establish the work of my hands for Your glory. May my life be rooted in Your presence and guided by Your eternal truth.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
